model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401878088). 15/22 player embeddings matched, well-covered both sides: St. Gallen (home) 8/11, Benfica (away) 7/11.

bets.staking_method: Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula: fullKelly 23.7%, halfKelly 11.9% -> cap binds -> 0.08 x EUR193.43 = EUR15.47 -> EUR16; taken at EUR12, slightly below full formula, given strong lineup-embedding coverage both sides.

Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula: fullKelly 4.6%, halfKelly 2.3% (under cap) -> 0.023 x EUR193.43 = EUR4.45, rounded down to a EUR3 secondary leg alongside the home-win leg (marginal edge, not a data-trust discount -- taken near formula size).

excluded_legs_note: Away win (Benfica, -20.3pp edge, -27.2% EV) excluded as a clear no-bet.
data_note: 15/22 player embeddings matched (8/11 home, 7/11 away) -- good coverage, edges treated as trustworthy on both legs.
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs; bet placed at Unibet around the 18:00Z kickoff; this commit logged minutes after kickoff, before any result information. Not a pre-kickoff-proof pick per the strict standard.
settlement_note: Home win leg WON -- St. Gallen beat Benfica 2-1 at home (EUR12 @ 7.00 = EUR84 return, EUR72 profit). Draw leg lost (EUR3 stake). Net +EUR69.00. Settled via ESPN scoreboard (event 401878088, STATUS_FULL_TIME).
